text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, as I walk through the shopping district
with Winning Ticket...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoaa! Look at that, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand-prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: You two over there! Care to try your luck?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Did you hear that? A vacation! And to a hot
spring!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
You can have fun, eat, and soak in the hot spring!
All while becoming better friends!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Isn't that amazing?! Viva la hot springs!
choice_data_list: Don't speak too soon. You haven't won yet.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Well said! You can't win the prize if you don't
play the game!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Young lady, do you have any tickets?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, yeah! The cashier gave us one at that shop!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I know! Trainer, let's spin this thing together!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If we put all our spirit into it, we'll definitely win
that grand-prize!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On my count, we spin the tumbler. And the result
is...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the ticket for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: NO WAAAY! Did we really win?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, he really said "grand-prize," right? I'm
not dreaming or anything?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaah! I'm so happyyy!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Haha! After seeing a reaction like that, I'm feeling
pretty over the moon myself!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Mister, you're the best! I'll use this special ticket
with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! We spun the raffle tumbler together, so the
prize belongs to both of us, right?
choice_data_list: Well, I can't say no to that.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
When should we go? I wonder when the best time
is!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I got it! Let's go once the Twinkle Series is
over, to celebrate!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Steaming hot springs after all those blazing-hot
battles! I bet that'll feel awesome!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
WOOO! I gotta win lots of races so we can have
the funnest time on vacation!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So at Winning Ticket's request, I hold onto the
hot spring vacation ticket for the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wonder Luck's carrot hamburger steak?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Hahaha! You two are funny!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
You ain't wrong though—it sure is a lucky prize to
win! This juicy delicacy even comes with a famous
gourmet's seal of approval!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Ooh! Sounds yummy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Let's cook it up tonight!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Grill it over a hot flame, drizzle it with lots of oil,
then add globs of sauce...
choice_data_list: Uhh, maybe I could help you with that?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You wanna eat some too, Trainer? Cool, cool!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I hope the cafeteria kitchen's still open! Let's
hurry back before it closes! Go, go, gooo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
GOOO! I'm on fire right now, and that's just what
we need to grill this hamburger!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make sure she doesn't burn the hamburger steak
to a crisp, and once it's done, we eat the
delicious meal together.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Wow! That's a whole bunch of carrots!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
How is this not the grand-prize?! You're giving
away this many carrots just for getting second
place?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: Of course! They're all yours!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
One, two, three... Whoa! Even if I ate them every
day for a whole week, there'd still be some left!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: This might actually be too much for me...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I know! You can have half of them, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Of course!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
If we share carrots, we share the happiness! It'll
make our friendship even better!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: We got something greater than even the grand-prize. Sniffle... Our bond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is moved to tears as I accept half
of the carrots.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You won third-prize!
Here's your carrot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: A single carrot...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: No, this is fine!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
After all, I won this carrot with my luck and your
support!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Get it? It's proof of our fiery friendship!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Awwww! I'm getting moved to tears!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Let's preserve this carrot forever, to remember
today!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: For real?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You mean we can't keep it as a symbol of our fun times together? Sob...
choice_data_list: It'll stay in our memory if we eat it together.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, you're RIGHT!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Okay then, here's half!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yummm! That's tasty!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We reflect deeply on the flavor of the
carrot—perhaps too deeply—and head back
home.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whaaaaat?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
O-one more time! Let me try again! I'll get the
grand-prize—I know it!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, if you don't have another raffle ticket, I
can't let you.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaahh! What a bummeeeerrr!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since Ticket happens to be crying, I hand her a
tissue from the consolation prize.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sob, sniffle... This tissue... is so soft...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Their featherlight feel is their charm! They're
extra soft and comforting!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... A little...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
B-but... I would've really liked to win the grand
priiize! Waaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of the comforting tissues, it takes a
while for Winning Ticket to settle down.
